lines.english: Why did Harrison sell his house so quickly?
lines.chinese: 为什么哈里森把房子卖得这么快？
lines.raw: Why did Harrison sell his house so quickly? | 为什么哈里森把房子卖得这么快？

lines.english: My old friend, Harrison, had lived in
lines.chinese: 我的老朋友哈里森在
lines.raw: My old friend, Harrison, had lived in | 我的老朋友哈里森在

lines.english: the Mediterranean for many years
lines.chinese: 地中海地区住过多年，
lines.raw: the Mediterranean for many years | 地中海地区住过多年，

lines.english: before he returned to England.
lines.chinese: 然后才回到英国。
lines.raw: before he returned to England. | 然后才回到英国。

lines.english: He had often dreamed of retiring in England
lines.chinese: 他曾常常梦想在英国退休，
lines.raw: He had often dreamed of retiring in England | 他曾常常梦想在英国退休，

lines.english: and had planned to settle down in the country.
lines.chinese: 并计划在乡村安顿下来。
lines.raw: and had planned to settle down in the country. | 并计划在乡村安顿下来。

lines.english: He had no sooner returned than he bought
lines.chinese: 他刚一回来就买下
lines.raw: He had no sooner returned than he bought | 他刚一回来就买下

lines.english: a house and went to live there.
lines.chinese: 了所房子住了进去。
lines.raw: a house and went to live there. | 了所房子住了进去。

lines.english: Almost immediately he began to complain
lines.chinese: 他几乎是立刻就开始抱怨
lines.raw: Almost immediately he began to complain | 他几乎是立刻就开始抱怨

lines.english: about the weather,
lines.chinese: 天气了，
lines.raw: about the weather, | 天气了，

lines.english: for even though it was still summer,
lines.chinese: 因为尽管当时仍是夏天，
lines.raw: for even though it was still summer, | 因为尽管当时仍是夏天，

lines.english: it rained continually and it was often bitterly cold.
lines.chinese: 但却一直下雨，而且常常冷得厉害。
lines.raw: it rained continually and it was often bitterly cold. | 但却一直下雨，而且常常冷得厉害。

lines.english: After so many years of sunshine,
lines.chinese: 在阳光充足的地方生活了那么多年之后，
lines.raw: After so many years of sunshine, | 在阳光充足的地方生活了那么多年之后，

lines.english: Harrison got a shock.
lines.chinese: 哈里森感到很震惊。
lines.raw: Harrison got a shock. | 哈里森感到很震惊。

lines.english: He acted as if he had never lived in England before.
lines.chinese: 他的举动就好像他以前从未在英国生活过一样。
lines.raw: He acted as if he had never lived in England before. | 他的举动就好像他以前从未在英国生活过一样。

lines.english: In the end, it was more than he could bear.
lines.chinese: 最终，他再也忍受不了了。
lines.raw: In the end, it was more than he could bear. | 最终，他再也忍受不了了。

lines.english: He had hardly had time to settle down
lines.chinese: 他还没来得及安顿下来，
lines.raw: He had hardly had time to settle down | 他还没来得及安顿下来，

lines.english: when he sold the house and left the country.
lines.chinese: 就把房子卖掉离开了英国。
lines.raw: when he sold the house and left the country. | 就把房子卖掉离开了英国。

lines.english: The dream he had had for so many years ended there.
lines.chinese: 他多年的梦想就这样破灭了。
lines.raw: The dream he had had for so many years ended there. | 他多年的梦想就这样破灭了。

lines.english: Harrison had thought of everything except the weather.
lines.chinese: 哈里森把什么都考虑到了，就是没想到天气。
lines.raw: Harrison had thought of everything except the weather. | 哈里森把什么都考虑到了，就是没想到天气。
